---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement for the AI Prompt Generator skill
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement, needs-triage
assignees: ''
---

## 💡 Feature Description

A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see.

## 🎯 Problem Statement

**Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.**

Example: I'm always frustrated when [...]

## 💭 Proposed Solution

Describe the solution you'd like to see implemented.

## 🔄 Alternatives Considered

A clear description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## 📊 Use Cases

Describe specific use cases for this feature:

### Use Case 1: [Title]
**As a**: [type of user]
**I want to**: [action]
**So that**: [benefit]

### Use Case 2: [Title]
**As a**: [type of user]
**I want to**: [action]
**So that**: [benefit]

## 🎨 Mockups/Examples

If applicable, add mockups, diagrams, or examples of the desired functionality.

```
Example of how the feature would work:

Input: "..."
Output: "..."
```

## 🔧 Implementation Ideas

Do you have ideas on how this could be implemented? (Optional)

## 📈 Impact

**How would this feature benefit users?**

- [ ] Improves productivity
- [ ] Enhances user experience
- [ ] Adds new capabilities
- [ ] Fixes a common frustration
- [ ] Other: [specify]

**Who would benefit from this feature?**

- [ ] All users
- [ ] Flutter developers
- [ ] Game developers
- [ ] Beginners
- [ ] Advanced users
- [ ] Other: [specify]

## 🎯 Priority

How important is this feature to you?

- [ ] **Critical** - Blocking my work
- [ ] **High** - Would significantly improve my workflow
- [ ] **Medium** - Nice to have
- [ ] **Low** - Minor enhancement

## 🤝 Contribution

**Would you be willing to help implement this feature?**

- [ ] Yes, I can implement this
- [ ] Yes, I can help with testing
- [ ] Yes, I can help with documentation
- [ ] No, I'm just suggesting

## 📚 Related Features

Are there any existing features that relate to this?

- Related to #[issue number]
- Builds on #[issue number]
- Complements #[issue number]

## 🌍 Examples from Other Tools

Are there examples of this feature in other tools? Please share links or screenshots.

## 🏷️ Labels

Please add relevant labels:
- `enhancement` - New feature or request
- `documentation` - Documentation improvements
- `good first issue` - Good for newcomers
- `help wanted` - Extra attention needed
- `area: templates` - Template-related
- `area: ui` - UI/UX related
- `area: performance` - Performance improvements

---

**By submitting this feature request, I confirm that:**
- [ ] I have searched existing issues to ensure this is not a duplicate
- [ ] I have provided a clear problem statement and solution
- [ ] I have described concrete use cases
- [ ] I understand this is an open-source project and features are implemented based on community priorities
